title: Shadowlands
description: Adds 4 new dimensions, each with biomes and dungeons, there's loads to explore!
body:
Shadowlands is a mod which adds 4 new dimensions, each with biomes and dungeons, there's loads to explore! 
___
The Shadowlands dimension is a dark shadowy dimension with grey trees and black stone dungeons along with occasional red cactus forests and creeper forests, here you will find the keys to the Glowshroom Forest and Vellium dimensions.
___
The Glowshroom forest has glowing mushrooms everywhere, but be careful - some of them can move and are not at all welcoming to outsiders. The dimension also has strange stinging Jellyfish and Spore Mines, which will explode without warning if you go near them. And of course there are plenty of towers and dungeons to loot and explore.
___
The Vellium dimension is a bright sunny cheerful place - but do not be fooled - the strange yellow one-eyed beasts which inhabit it are deadly.
___
The Blood Forest dimension is an evil dark place, full of hostile mobs and covered in sharp spikes which without the right armor can tear apart the player, the most powerful bosses can be summoned here.
___

Want to see more images? Go here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shadowlands/screenshots 
____
Want to see a short video of the mod? [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wAtaQ4ICaiw&feature=emb_title ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8MQDNAWk2gs)

Wiki: https://shadowlands.fandom.com/wiki/Shadowlands_Wiki (it is very outdated in places)
___

Credits:

Sound effects from www.zapsplat.com
Red Knight model by Toby109tt
Persian localization by Arsham81SHAE
Spanish localization by ImLimon and MelonpanCristi
Simplified Chinese localization by Andypsl8
